title: Whimscape Better Containers GUI
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack for Whimscape that makes the container GUI better!
body:
- Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) _for his resource pack_ Whimscape

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab30d3739908c7958f04d056f509c2482950f73.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

- This pack's textures were inspired by [Unique Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark), [Recolourful Containers GUI + HUD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui) and [Colourful containers GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui)

### This pack requires

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0515188a92a0e8a807b3a3537a32679ea08f5fa8_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)


# Whimscape Better Containers

This pack tries to retexture the Container GUI to make them more Unique, Fancy, Colourful and Better overall


<details>
<summary>Preview</summary>

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333e26dd6f6b9101968d2ee30db700b09013f8ee.png)

</details>

## ! Copper Chest Coming Soon !
